avatar-col: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0;
thread-line: width: 1px; background: var(--thread-line); flex: 1; margin: 6px 0 0; min-height: 28px;
post-head: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 14px;
post-media: aspect-ratio: 16/10; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A2E2E 0%, #2B5C5C 50%, #A9D6C5 100%); margin-top: 10px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
action-row: display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 10px; color: var(--text);
action-ico: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary);
tab: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
